text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas! The situation is grave, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My passion for racing has begun to swell. I fear I
cannot contain it much longer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Lalalaaa! ♪ The Centurial Overlord shall prevail
this day! ♪ That being me, I must do say! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The power to make all cower—I'll trounce any
foe! ♪ That is I! T.M. Opera Ooo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let her impulses run free until she elatedly heads
for the track.
